name: Lentil Loaf
recipeIngredient: 6 slices bread, torn into small pieces
1 package dry Knorr Spring Vegetable soup mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients, except the dry bread crumbs, in a large bowl and mix well.
2. Pour the mixture into a greased loaf pan and bake at 400°F for 40 minutes.
3. After baking, sprinkle the top with dried bread crumbs and continue baking another 10 minutes.
4. Let sit for 10 minutes or so before serving.
5. Top each serving with vegetarian gravy.
